description_long: This is a large, ornate metal vessel with a rounded body, two elaborately designed side handles, and a wide, flared lid topped with a small knob. The object stands on four curved feet and features a prominent spout with a tap at the front, suggesting a function related to dispensing liquid. The surface is smooth with a muted metallic sheen, and the handles and feet are decorated with intricate scrollwork. The lid has a vented collar, adding to its decorative and functional appeal. The overall form and embellishments evoke the style of a traditional Russian samovar, often used for heating and serving tea. Its robust construction and decorative elements make it suitable as a striking urban decorative piece.
description: A large, ornate metallic vessel with decorative handles, a spout, and a domed lid, reminiscent of a traditional samovar. Its smooth, muted finish and intricate scrollwork make it a striking urban decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout and tap, both handles, and the full decorative lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle and the spout extending to the left, with the tap visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both handles and the back of the vessel, with no spout visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the spout and tap extending to the right, and one handle in clear view.
